name: HMO_MODEL_PLANS_B
description: The main table to store the model plan.

columns.Name: MODEL_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Model Plan Id . This is the primary ley

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Id of the system.This is the foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Effective Date of the model plan.

columns.Name: MODEL_PLAN_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the  model plan . The valid values are  DRAFT,PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED.

columns.Name: MODEL_PLAN_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the Model Plan Top Manager like Position or Line Manager

columns.Name: ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Action Id. This is the foreign key to PER_ACTIONS_VL.

columns.Name: ACTION_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Action Reason Id. This is the foreign key to PER_ACTION_REASONS_VL

columns.Name: AUTHOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Author's Person Id of the model plan.

columns.Name: TOP_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Top Manager Person Id  whose hierarchy is being modeled.

columns.Name: TOP_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Top Manager  Assignment Id  whose hierarchy is being displayed.

columns.Name: TOP_MANAGER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the Manager i.e LINE_MANAGER , RESOURCE_MANAGER , PROJECT_MANAGER

columns.Name: ACCESS_TO_TOP_MANAGER
columns.Comments: The flag indicates whether the top manager can access the model. The valid values are Y/N and the default value is 'Y'.

columns.Name: MODEL_LOADER_BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the Batch loader process

columns.Name: LAST_SYNC_DATE
columns.Comments: Last Sync Date indicates the date of last synchronization to the Fusion System source

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
